prompt: Provide a concise strategic recommendation under ambiguity: three stakeholders have conflicting priorities and no final budget has been approved. Resolve this with explicit assumptions and a verifiable next step.

prompt: Design a system where requirements intentionally conflict: globally synchronous writes, sub-100ms latency everywhere, and no extra cost. Explicitly identify what cannot be satisfied together and include a contradiction check.
